title: Blender

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Set the appliance controller to run the blender for 5 seconds using the timed setting.
2. Prompt the switch user to press their switch to blend their smoothie or soup.
3. They may need to press it a few times until it is fully blended.

tooltipText: Use an appliance controller to turn on a blender and make a smoothie
